seo.defaultDescription: Portfolio featuring experience, projects, skills, and contact information for Your Name.

profile.name: Your Name
profile.tagline: I build reliable web experiences with clean UX, measurable outcomes, and scalable architecture.
profile.shortBio: I design and ship full-stack products across frontend, backend, and cloud workflows. I care about performance, usability, and business impact.

about.heading: About Me
paragraphs: I enjoy turning ambiguous problems into products users actually adopt. My approach combines user empathy, clear technical architecture, and fast iteration.
I collaborate closely with stakeholders, convert goals into milestones, and keep delivery quality high through testing, observability, and documentation.

bullets: Led development of customer-facing features that improved conversion and retention.
Reduced release risk by introducing stronger CI checks and staged deployments.
Mentored engineers and improved team velocity through reusable component patterns.
Built internal tooling that automated manual operations and reduced turnaround time.
Shipped API and UI enhancements that improved task completion rates.

projects.title: Project Alpha
projects.description: A web platform that streamlined team workflows with real-time dashboards and notifications.

projects.title: Project Beta
projects.description: A data-rich application with robust search, filters, and analytics for decision-making.

contact.heading: Get Back to Me
contact.description: Tell me about your need and share your contact details. I will follow up as soon as possible.
contact.privacyNote: Your details are used only to reply to your inquiry and are never shared with third parties.
